dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 3496 : Northern Mariana Islands Small Business Access Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Received; read twice and referred to the Committee on Small Business and Entrepreneurship

form.official-title: To amend the Small Business Act for microloan eligibility for the Commonwealth of the Northern Mariana Islands, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Northern Mariana Islands Small Business Access Act.

section.header: Inclusion of the Commonwealth of the Northern Mariana Islands in the microloan program

subsection.text: Section 7(m)(7)(B) of the Small Business Act (15 U.S.C. 636(m)(7)(B)) is amended—

paragraph.text: by inserting , the Commonwealth of the Northern Mariana Islands after Guam each place it appears; and
in clause (i)(I)(bb), by striking 1/55 and inserting 1/56.

subsection.text: Section 7(m)(11)(C)(ii) of the Small Business Act (15 U.S.C. 636(m)(11)(C)(ii)) is amended by striking rural and all that follows through the end of the clause and inserting rural; and.

attestation-group.attestation-date: Passed the House of Representatives January 20, 2026.
